violations.text: Packaged desserts from an unapproved source observed for sale in dairy refrigerator. Owner was called to discuss findings, and he stated he was trying to help out a friend. Food must be purchased from an approved source. Desserts were voluntarily disposed of by PIC. English Approved Food Source Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest freezers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Beverages observed stored in the back area with water from a refrigeration line dripping onto it. Food must be stored in a clean dry location, where it is not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Hot water was not available at the hand sink in the toilet room. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The door to the toilet room from the beverage storage area is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of trash, vegetation, litter, and leaf litter. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The outside area along the building has an accumulation of litter, vegetation, boards, tires, rocks, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The toilet room door has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

Storage shelves in the back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, dead insects, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The insulation on the refrigeration coolant line is in poor repair, with pieces missing, and frost build-up occurring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
